title: cyclosorus subattenuatus
intro: Cyclosorus subattenuatus, also known as the slender leather fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus subattenuatus include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce pain and swelling, and even help to lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or as a dried powder, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
